description: Target DB override presets for INIT$_SP_PREDICTED_TYPE. M90001 loads these values from the selected internal model resource.

targetSettingCategories.CATEGORY_DESC: Stores Target DB overrides for column type classification model defaults.

DEFAULTS.SETTING_DESC: If the physical data type is in this list, it is classified as NUM before sample conversion checks. Separate values with commas or line breaks.
If the distinct-value ratio exceeds this value, the column is classified as identifier-like.
If the distinct-value count is less than or equal to this value, the column is classified as a categorical candidate.
If a text column exceeds this distinct-value ratio and meets the entropy threshold, it is classified as simple text.
Normalized entropy threshold used for numeric ordinal and text classification.
Column names that should always be classified as identifiers. Separate values with commas or line breaks.
